mapper.select:
select
from t_tunnel_name_result a where exists (select 1 from t_user_tunnel b where a.id = b.tunnel_name_id and b.user_id = #{userId})
select a.* from t_tunnel_name_result a left join t_user_tunnel b on a.id = b.tunnel_name_id where a.level = 4 and b.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT t.id FROM t_tunnel_name_result t WHERE t.level = 4 AND ( t.id IN (SELECT tunnel_name_id FROM t_user_tunnel WHERE user_id = #{userId}) OR t.parent_id IN (SELECT tunnel_name_id FROM t_user_tunnel WHERE user_id = #{userId}) OR t.parent_id IN (SELECT id FROM t_tunnel_name_result WHERE parent_id IN (SELECT tunnel_name_id FROM t_user_tunnel WHERE user_id = #{userId})) OR t.parent_id IN (SELECT id FROM t_tunnel_name_result p WHERE p.parent_id IN (SELECT id FROM t_tunnel_name_result WHERE parent_id IN (SELECT tunnel_name_id FROM t_user_tunnel WHERE user_id = #{userId}))) )

SELECT t.id FROM t_tunnel_name_result t WHERE t.level = 4 AND ( t.id IN (SELECT tunnel_name_id FROM t_user_tunnel WHERE user_id = #{userId}) OR t.parent_id IN ( SELECT ut.tunnel_name_id FROM t_user_tunnel ut INNER JOIN t_tunnel_name_result tn ON ut.tunnel_name_id = tn.id WHERE ut.user_id = #{userId} AND tn.level = 3 ) )
